---
title: "Follow-up Dashboard"
params:
  data_path: NULL
output:
  flexdashboard::flex_dashboard:
    orientation: rows
    vertical_layout: fill
    self_contained: true
runtime: shiny
---

```{r}
library(flexdashboard)
library(shiny)
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(plotly)
library(DT)
library(scales)
library(ggplot2)

print(params$data_path)
print(file.exists(params$data_path))

dashboard_detail <- read_csv(params$data_path, show_col_types = FALSE)

dashboard_detail <- dashboard_detail %>%
  mutate(
    eligible_flag = as.numeric(eligible_flag),
    Score = as.numeric(Score)
  )
```

```{r}
staff_choices <- sort(unique(na.omit(dashboard_detail$staff)))
event_choices <- sort(unique(na.omit(dashboard_detail$event_short)))
status_choices <- sort(unique(na.omit(dashboard_detail$statusId)))

selectInput(
  "staff",
  "Staff",
  choices = c("All", staff_choices),
  selected = "All"
)

selectInput(
  "event_short",
  "Event",
  choices = c("All", event_choices),
  selected = "All"
)

selectInput(
  "statusId",
  "Status",
  choices = c("All", status_choices),
  selected = "All"
)
```

```{r}
filtered_data <- reactive({
  df <- dashboard_detail

  if (input$staff != "All") {
    df <- df %>% filter(staff == input$staff)
  }

  if (input$event_short != "All") {
    df <- df %>% filter(event_short == input$event_short)
  }

  if (input$statusId != "All") {
    df <- df %>% filter(statusId == input$statusId)
  }

  df
})

summary_data <- reactive({
  filtered_data() %>%
    group_by(staff, event_short) %>%
    summarise(
      denominator = sum(eligible_flag == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
      numerator = sum(if_else(eligible_flag == 1, coalesce(Score, 0), 0), na.rm = TRUE),
      progress = if_else(denominator > 0, numerator / denominator, NA_real_),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    arrange(staff, event_short)
})
```

```{r}
renderValueBox({
  valueBox(
    value = sum(filtered_data()$eligible_flag == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
    caption = "Total Denominator"
  )
})
```

```{r}
renderValueBox({
  valueBox(
    value = sum(if_else(filtered_data()$eligible_flag == 1, coalesce(filtered_data()$Score, 0), 0), na.rm = TRUE),
    caption = "Total Numerator"
  )
})
```

```{r}
renderValueBox({
  denom <- sum(filtered_data()$eligible_flag == 1, na.rm = TRUE)
  num <- sum(if_else(filtered_data()$eligible_flag == 1, coalesce(filtered_data()$Score, 0), 0), na.rm = TRUE)
  prog <- ifelse(denom > 0, num / denom, NA_real_)

  valueBox(
    value = ifelse(is.na(prog), "NA", percent(prog, accuracy = 0.1)),
    caption = "Overall Progress"
  )
})
```

```{r}
renderPlotly({
  df <- filtered_data() %>%
    group_by(staff) %>%
    summarise(
      denominator = sum(eligible_flag == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
      numerator = sum(if_else(eligible_flag == 1, coalesce(Score, 0), 0), na.rm = TRUE),
      progress = if_else(denominator > 0, numerator / denominator, NA_real_),
      .groups = "drop"
    )

  p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = reorder(staff, progress), y = progress)) +
    geom_col() +
    scale_y_continuous(labels = percent_format()) +
    labs(
      x = "Staff",
      y = "Progress",
      title = "Progress by Staff"
    ) +
    theme_minimal()

  ggplotly(p)
})
```

```{r}
renderPlotly({
  df <- filtered_data() %>%
    group_by(event_short) %>%
    summarise(
      denominator = sum(eligible_flag == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
      numerator = sum(if_else(eligible_flag == 1, coalesce(Score, 0), 0), na.rm = TRUE),
      progress = if_else(denominator > 0, numerator / denominator, NA_real_),
      .groups = "drop"
    )

  p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = reorder(event_short, progress), y = progress)) +
    geom_col() +
    scale_y_continuous(labels = percent_format()) +
    labs(
      x = "Event",
      y = "Progress",
      title = "Progress by Event"
    ) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

  ggplotly(p)
})
```

```{r}
renderDT({
  summary_data() %>%
    mutate(
      progress = percent(progress, accuracy = 0.1)
    ) %>%
    datatable(
      rownames = FALSE,
      options = list(
        pageLength = 15,
        scrollX = TRUE
      )
    )
})
```

```{r}
renderDT({
  filtered_data() %>%
    datatable(
      rownames = FALSE,
      options = list(
        pageLength = 15,
        scrollX = TRUE
      )
    )
})
```
